title: calliandra minutifolia
intro: Calliandra minutifolia, also known as the small-flowered powder puff or Mexican bird's eye, is a flowering plant species within the Mimosaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Calliandra minutifolia include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, gastrointestinal issues, and skin problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are commonly used in folk medicine in certain regions.
